summary: Iteration 4 testing complete - All NEW features tested and working: Agents API (GET/POST/POST from-template/DELETE), Notes API (GET/POST/DELETE), Tasks API (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), Skills API (GET/toggle), Agent Manager UI with templates grid and custom agent creation, Conversation linked to agents
critical_code_review_comments: Agents API properly returns both custom agents and templates in GET /api/agents
Agent templates (coder, researcher, analyst, automator) all work correctly
Notes and Tasks APIs have proper CRUD operations with user isolation
Skills toggle endpoint works correctly to enable/disable skills
Conversation with agent_id properly links to agent and uses agent's system_prompt
Agent Manager UI shows templates grid with 4 templates and custom agent creation form
Skills Dashboard shows all 13 skills with enable/disable toggles
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - using existing admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 4 tested and working: 1) Agents API - GET /api/agents returns {custom: [], templates: [4 templates]}, POST /api/agents creates custom agent, POST /api/agents/from-template/{id} creates from template, DELETE /api/agents/{id} deletes agent. 2) Notes API - GET /api/notes, POST /api/notes, DELETE /api/notes/{id}. 3) Tasks API - GET /api/tasks, POST /api/tasks, PUT /api/tasks/{id} (mark done), DELETE /api/tasks/{id}. 4) Skills API - GET /api/skills returns 13 skills, POST /api/skills/{id}/toggle. 5) Agent Manager UI shows templates grid and custom creation form. 6) Conversations can be linked to agents via agent_id field.

agents_api.GET /api/agents: PASS - Returns {custom: [], templates: [coder, researcher, analyst, automator]}
agents_api.POST /api/agents: PASS - Creates custom agent with name, description, system_prompt, skills_enabled
agents_api.POST /api/agents/from-template/coder: PASS - Creates agent from coder template
agents_api.POST /api/agents/from-template/researche: PASS - Creates agent from researcher template
agents_api.DELETE /api/agents/{id}: PASS - Deletes agent and verifies removal

notes_api.POST /api/notes: PASS - Creates note with title, content, tags

tasks_api.POST /api/tasks: PASS - Creates task with title, description, priority, done=false
tasks_api.PUT /api/tasks/{id}: PASS - Updates task, marks as done

skills_api.GET /api/skills: PASS - Returns 13 skills with enabled status

conversation_with_agent.POST /api/conversations with agent_id: PASS - Creates conversation linked to agent

agent_manager_ui.templates_grid: PASS - Shows 4 templates: Dev Expert, Pesquisador Web, Analista de Dados, Automatizador
agent_manager_ui.create_from_template: PASS - Clicking template creates agent and shows 'Ja adicionado'
agent_manager_ui.custom_agent_form: PASS - Shows form with name, description, system_prompt fields
agent_manager_ui.save_custom_agent: PASS - Creates agent and shows in 'SEUS AGENTES' list
agent_manager_ui.start_chat_with_agent: PASS - Play button creates conversation linked to agent

skills_dashboard_ui.skills_list: PASS - Shows all 13 skills with descriptions
skills_dashboard_ui.enabled_skills: PASS - Shows enabled skills with yellow highlight
skills_dashboard_ui.vps_skills: PASS - Shows VPS-required skills (Browser, Cron, E-mail)

notes.agent_templates: 4 templates available: coder (Dev Expert), researcher (Pesquisador Web), analyst (Analista de Dados), automator (Automatizador)
notes.skills_count: 13 skills total - 10 available, 3 require VPS deployment
notes.conversation_agent_link: When conversation has agent_id, messages[0] system prompt is replaced with agent's system_prompt
